content.trigger: When creating a new SQLite-backed persistence store in the control plane or Site layers.
steps: Define the interface in src/types/runtime.ts or a local types file.
Use atomic file writes: write to temp file, then rename.
Use better-sqlite3 prepared statements (.prepare().run()) instead of .exec() with parameters.
Ensure the parent directory exists before opening the database.
Add focused tests covering: path resolution, CRUD, persistence across reopen, and audit logging if applicable.
content.authority_note: Does not apply to non-filesystem stores (e.g., remote KV, HTTP APIs). Does not bypass existing ForemanFacade or Scheduler authority.
content.verification_hint: Run pnpm verify and focused tests. Check that .exec() is not used with bound parameters.
